style.aesthetic: Flat graphic with photographic food element

design_language.layout_type: Split horizontal layout — upper graphic zone, lower CTA band
design_language.visual_hierarchy: Food image dominates upper left; headline text anchors upper right; brand CTA in bottom strip
design_language.design_motif: Radial burst / sunray lines emanating from center-left behind food bowl — creates energy and draw

color_logic.background_color: Bright red with radial burst pattern in slightly varied red tones
color_logic.contrast_strategy: White text on red for headline; white text on dark red for CTA strip — both high contrast

color_usage.background: Full red with sunray burst pattern
color_usage.cta_text_color: White with brand name in bold white
color_usage.food_image: Natural warm browns and oranges (gulab jamun) — complementary to red background

typography.headline_font_style: Rounded, bold sans-serif — casual and friendly
typography.cta_font_style: Mixed weight — lighter for descriptor, bold for brand name

text_placement.headline_position: Upper right quadrant — vertically stacked, right-aligned feel
text_placement.cta_position: Bottom horizontal band spanning full width
text_placement.brand_name_position: Bottom band, right-aligned within CTA strip
text_placement.text_layering: Text sits on flat color zones — no text overlaid on food image

graphics_and_image_placement.food_image_position: Upper left — large circular bowl partially cropped at left and bottom edges
graphics_and_image_placement.food_image_style: Top-down overhead shot of gulab jamun in black bowl — clean product photography
graphics_and_image_placement.image_cropping: Partial crop creates dynamic tension — bowl bleeds off left and bottom
graphics_and_image_placement.background_graphic: Radial burst lines in slightly darker red tone behind food
graphics_and_image_placement.brand_logo_placement: Text-based logo in CTA band bottom right

ads.overall_design_language: High-energy monochromatic red world. The design uses a single dominant hue family to create brand consistency while the food image provides textural relief. The split-band layout creates clear zones of communication.

message_delivery.message_flow: Craving question (headline) → Offer answer (CTA band) → Brand attribution
message_delivery.emotional_trigger: Craving activation through food visual + question format
message_delivery.offer_visibility: High — clearly placed in dedicated bottom strip

style.overall_style: Dynamic, bold, promotional — food-forward with graphic callout
style.aesthetic: Layered graphic design with photographic food hero

design_language.layout_type: Full bleed background with floating food image and overlaid graphic badge
design_language.visual_hierarchy: Headline top-center → Pizza hero center → Starburst offer badge bottom-left → Brand name bottom-right
design_language.design_motif: Jagged starburst / speech bubble shape for offer callout — creates urgency and visual pop

color_logic.color_temperature: Warm — red and yellow are both appetite colors
color_logic.contrast_strategy: White text on red (headline); dark red/brown text on yellow badge (offer) — dual contrast zones

color_usage.headline_text_color: White with yellow underline accent on key word
color_usage.food_image: Natural warm pizza tones — reds, greens, browns — pops against red bg

typography.headline_font_style: Bold rounded sans-serif — friendly but assertive
typography.offer_badge_font_style: Extra bold, compressed sans-serif — maximum impact in small space
typography.text_case: Lowercase headline; uppercase offer badge — creates two tone registers
typography.underline_accent: Yellow underline beneath key word in headline — draws emphasis

text_placement.offer_badge_position: Bottom left — overlapping food image base
text_placement.brand_name_position: Bottom right — balanced counterpart to badge
text_placement.text_layering: Headline floats on red background; badge overlaps food image for depth

graphics_and_image_placement.food_image_position: Center-right — large pizza slightly off-center, angled for dynamism
graphics_and_image_placement.food_image_style: Eye-level hero shot — whole pizza with steam implied
graphics_and_image_placement.image_cropping: Pizza slightly cropped at right edge — creates movement
graphics_and_image_placement.offer_graphic: Jagged starburst badge bottom-left — contrasting yellow against red
graphics_and_image_placement.image_layering: Pizza floats above background; badge overlaps pizza base — creates 3D layer effect

ads.overall_design_language: More layered and complex than Ad 1. Uses a three-layer composition (background → food → badge) to create visual depth. The starburst badge is a classic FMCG promotional graphic device. Yellow-on-red color pairing maximizes appetite appeal.

message_delivery.message_flow: Engagement question (top) → Desire object — pizza (center) → Offer hook (badge) → Brand close (bottom right)
message_delivery.offer_visibility: Very high — yellow badge stands out strongly on red

style.aesthetic: Clean flat background with large food hero and offer badge

design_language.visual_hierarchy: Large headline left → Food image dominates right → Offer badge overlaid on food → Brand bottom-left
design_language.design_motif: Circular offer badge overlapping food image — classic promotional device
design_language.use_of_negative_space: Low — red fills all non-food areas

color_logic.secondary_color: #FFD700 / Golden Yellow (headline word accent and badge)
color_logic.color_temperature: Extremely warm — red + yellow = maximum appetite stimulation
color_logic.contrast_strategy: Yellow text on red (primary headline word); white text on red (secondary headline + brand); red/dark text on yellow badge

color_usage.primary_headline_word_color: Bright yellow — makes key word pop
color_usage.food_image: Warm golden-orange biryani — harmonizes with yellow text

typography.headline_font_style: Extra bold, large rounded sans-serif — massive type scale
typography.headline_size: Very large — occupies approximately 40% of left panel height
typography.text_case: Lowercase — approachable tone despite large size
typography.color_split_in_headline: First two words in yellow, last word in white — creates rhythm and emphasis

text_placement.headline_position: Left side — vertically centered, horizontally left-aligned
text_placement.offer_badge_position: Center-right — overlaid on food bowl rim area
text_placement.text_layering: Text entirely in left zone; food entirely in right zone — clean split

graphics_and_image_placement.food_image_position: Right half — large biryani bowl in copper pot, slightly center-biased
graphics_and_image_placement.food_image_style: Close-up hero shot with steam rising — emphasizes freshness and heat
graphics_and_image_placement.image_cropping: Bowl bleeds off right and bottom edges — fills right panel
graphics_and_image_placement.offer_badge: Circular red badge overlapping food at center-right junction
graphics_and_image_placement.steam_effect: Visible steam rising from biryani — adds movement and warmth

ads.overall_design_language: Classic left-text / right-food horizontal ad format. Maximum visual energy through yellow-on-red type. Steam from food adds sensory dynamism. Clean and readable at banner scale — works well as a display/feed ad.

message_delivery.message_flow: Craving trigger word headline (left) → Desire object — biryani (right) → Offer confirmation (badge) → Brand anchor (bottom left)
message_delivery.emotional_trigger: Heat, freshness, craving — 'hot hot' word repetition amplifies urgency
message_delivery.offer_visibility: High — badge is clear though secondary to headline

style.aesthetic: Minimal graphic elements — typography and food only

design_language.layout_type: Left-dominant text / Right food image — horizontal split
design_language.visual_hierarchy: Massive headline dominates left two-thirds → Food image right → Brand name bottom-left
design_language.design_motif: No decorative motifs — pure typographic + food photography power
design_language.use_of_negative_space: Very low — red background fills everything; type is extremely large

color_logic.background_color: Solid bright Zomato red — full bleed
color_logic.color_temperature: Warm red dominant — no yellow accent here
color_logic.contrast_strategy: Pure white text on red — maximum simplicity and legibility

color_usage.food_image: Natural burger and fries tones — warm browns, yellows, greens — contrast against red

typography.headline_font_style: Ultra bold condensed sans-serif — maximum typographic weight
typography.headline_size: Extremely large — fills majority of left panel, multi-line stacked
typography.sub_text_font_style: Regular weight, smaller — clear hierarchy below main headline
typography.text_case: Uppercase or title case implied by weight — bold assertion

text_placement.headline_position: Left side — large stacked text, vertically centered
text_placement.text_layering: All text strictly in left zone — food image has no text overlay

graphics_and_image_placement.food_image_position: Right side — burger and fries combo, large scale, slightly overlapping center
graphics_and_image_placement.food_image_style: Eye-level hero shot — classic burger composition with fries
graphics_and_image_placement.image_cropping: Food item bleeds off right and bottom — feels abundant
graphics_and_image_placement.image_layering: Food image appears to float slightly — shadow/depth implied

ads.overall_design_language: The most typographically dominant ad in the set. The massive headline IS the design. Minimalist approach — no badges, no bursts, no extra graphic elements. Confidence through simplicity. The scale of the type communicates the scale of the offer.

message_delivery.message_flow: Offer statement (huge headline) → Qualifier (small sub-text) → Brand attribution (bottom left) → Desire object (right)
message_delivery.emotional_trigger: Value and savings — 'free' is the hero word
message_delivery.offer_visibility: Maximum — the entire ad IS the offer announcement

style.overall_style: Premium, moody, editorial — luxury food photography aesthetic
style.aesthetic: Dark lifestyle photography — premium/fine dining feel

design_language.layout_type: Full-bleed dark lifestyle photo with elegant text overlay
design_language.visual_hierarchy: Elegant serif headline top-center → Food hero center → Price badge left-center → Brand attribution bottom-center
design_language.design_motif: No graphic bursts or badges — uses stamp/seal style badge for pricing — more refined
design_language.use_of_negative_space: Strategic — dark areas frame food naturally; atmospheric bokeh background

color_logic.secondary_color: #D4A017 / Warm Gold (implied in props and food)
color_logic.contrast_strategy: Off-white / cream text on dark background — elegant contrast; price badge uses stamp seal style

color_usage.price_badge_color: Cream/off-white with brown border — stamp aesthetic
color_usage.food_image: Golden-brown gulab jamun on white plate — warm tones glow against dark background
color_usage.props: Brass/copper vessels add richness and cultural authenticity

typography.headline_font_style: Elegant serif — editorial/magazine style — dramatic contrast from other ads
typography.headline_weight: Light to Regular — refined and understated
typography.brand_name_font: Standard Zomato wordmark in clean sans-serif
typography.font_personality: Sophisticated, festive, premium — targets aspirational food lovers
typography.text_case: Title case serif headline — formal and premium

text_placement.text_layering: Text overlaid directly on dark photograph — works because of tonal contrast

graphics_and_image_placement.food_image_position: Center — gulab jamun on white plate dominates mid-section
graphics_and_image_placement.food_image_style: Close-up, slightly elevated angle — beautifully lit with warm golden light
graphics_and_image_placement.background_style: Bokeh lifestyle setting — atmospheric candles, brass vessels, dark fabric
graphics_and_image_placement.image_mood: Festive/celebratory — Diwali or Indian occasion implied
graphics_and_image_placement.price_badge_graphic: Circular stamp/seal badge — refined alternative to starburst

ads.overall_design_language: Completely different design register from Ads 1-4. This is a premium, editorial, dark-mode aesthetic — closer to food magazine photography. Uses darkness and warmth to create desire and occasion-based relevance. Targets premium-conscious or occasion-driven consumers.

message_delivery.message_flow: Product name (elegant headline) → Visual desire (food image) → Price accessibility hook (badge) → Brand platform (bottom)
message_delivery.emotional_trigger: Aspiration + occasion + affordability surprise — premium look with accessible price
message_delivery.offer_visibility: Medium — badge is elegant and subtle rather than aggressive

style.aesthetic: Dark luxury gradient with bold typographic offer

design_language.layout_type: Left-dominant text / Right food image — horizontal with dark gradient
design_language.visual_hierarchy: Brand subscription label (top-left) → Massive price offer (center-left) → Duration qualifier (below) → Stripe CTA (bottom) → Food (right)
design_language.design_motif: Gold/amber gradient bottom stripe for secondary CTA — creates tiered message zones
design_language.use_of_negative_space: Low — dark background fills space; text is dense

color_logic.color_temperature: Dark warm — premium gold against deep maroon
color_logic.contrast_strategy: White on dark (headline), gold on dark (brand name), dark text on gold stripe (CTA)

color_usage.food_image: Warm pizza tones — reds and greens pop against dark background

typography.headline_font_style: Bold sans-serif — mix of regular and ultra-bold weights
typography.primary_offer_weight: Ultra bold — price is the hero
typography.brand_name_treatment: Mixed — 'zomato' in white, 'GOLD' in gold uppercase — product differentiation
typography.font_personality: Premium yet accessible — luxury feel with value messaging
typography.text_hierarchy_layers: 3 layers — brand label > main offer > fine print stripe

text_placement.top_label_position: Top left — small brand + product identifier
text_placement.bottom_stripe_position: Full-width bottom band — secondary offer info
text_placement.text_layering: Text on dark background left zone — clean separation from food

graphics_and_image_placement.food_image_position: Right side — pizza hero, large scale
graphics_and_image_placement.food_image_style: Eye-level beauty shot — Margherita-style pizza with fresh toppings
graphics_and_image_placement.image_lighting: Studio lit — glowing warm tones against dark background
graphics_and_image_placement.image_cropping: Pizza slightly cropped at right — feels generous
graphics_and_image_placement.bottom_stripe_graphic: Full-width gold gradient bar spanning entire bottom

ads.overall_design_language: Deliberately premium and dark — aligns with a subscription/loyalty product (Gold membership). Gold color signals exclusivity. Dark background elevates the food photography. The three-tier text structure (label > offer > qualifier) is more complex than standard ads — suits a considered-purchase message.

message_delivery.message_flow: Product identification (top) → Price shock/value hook (center large) → Duration context (below) → Additional benefit (bottom stripe) → Desire object (right)
message_delivery.emotional_trigger: Extreme value perception — '₹1' creates disbelief and urgency
message_delivery.offer_visibility: Maximum — price is the visual hero

style.overall_style: Clean, minimal, lifestyle — high-end food photography on neutral

design_language.layout_type: Full-bleed light background with food image left-center, offer text right-center
design_language.visual_hierarchy: Food image (left) → Large discount text (right) → Brand name (bottom-center)
design_language.design_motif: No graphic badges or bursts — clean typographic offer on neutral field
design_language.use_of_negative_space: High — cream/off-white background creates breathing room; most spacious design in set

color_logic.color_temperature: Neutral warm — very different from red-dominant other ads
color_logic.contrast_strategy: Dark brown text on light cream — elegant and readable without aggressive contrast

color_usage.background: Soft cream/off-white with subtle linen texture
color_usage.brand_name_color: Dark brown — standard Zomato wordmark in dark
color_usage.food_image: Warm earthy tones — chole bhature with wooden board, natural food colors

typography.headline_font_style: Bold serif-influenced or thick sans-serif — substantial but elegant
typography.headline_weight: Ultra bold for percentage, regular for supporting text
typography.font_personality: Premium, calm, confident — lets the offer speak without shouting
typography.text_case: Mixed — percentage large, supporting text small — creates clear hierarchy

text_placement.offer_text_position: Right-center — vertically centered, right of food image
text_placement.text_layering: Text on clean background — no overlap with food image

graphics_and_image_placement.food_image_position: Left-center — chole bhature on wooden platter, occupies left panel
graphics_and_image_placement.food_image_style: Top-angle lifestyle shot — natural lighting, wooden board, garnishes
graphics_and_image_placement.image_cropping: Food bleeds slightly off left edge
graphics_and_image_placement.background_texture: Subtle linen/fabric texture visible in upper portion — adds warmth
graphics_and_image_placement.image_mood: Artisan, homemade, authentic Indian food feel

ads.overall_design_language: The only truly minimal, light-background ad in the set. Targets a different consumer mindset — those who respond to quality and elegance over urgency. The cream palette and brown typography signal authenticity and premium quality. Bold discount number still delivers value message without aggressive design language.

message_delivery.primary_message_type: Discount offer — calm and confident delivery
message_delivery.message_flow: Food desire (image left) → Value hook (large percentage right) → Offer completeness (+ free delivery text) → Brand (bottom)
message_delivery.emotional_trigger: Value + quality — dual appeal to deal-seekers and quality-conscious
message_delivery.offer_visibility: High — large percentage number despite minimal design

style.aesthetic: Person-forward lifestyle photography with graphic type overlay

design_language.layout_type: Left text / Right lifestyle photo — horizontal with scrolling ticker strip
design_language.visual_hierarchy: Large headline left → Person eating pizza right → Offer badge top-right → Ticker strip bottom
design_language.design_motif: Scrolling repeating text ticker strip at bottom — motion and urgency implied; starburst offer badge top-right
design_language.use_of_negative_space: Low — rich and layered; dark film/vignette on left photo blends into type area

color_logic.background_color: Dark lifestyle photo bleeds into left text zone
color_logic.color_temperature: Dark warm — cozy indoor lifestyle setting
color_logic.contrast_strategy: White ultra-bold text on dark background (headline); red ticker strip with white text (bottom)

color_usage.background: Dark lifestyle photo — warm indoor scene
color_usage.person_image: Young woman in colorful sweater eating pizza — warm, relatable, joyful

typography.headline_font_style: Ultra bold, extra-wide sans-serif — maximum visual impact
typography.headline_size: Extremely large — fills most of left panel
typography.ticker_font_style: Medium bold sans-serif — readable at speed
typography.font_personality: Loud, fun, youthful — most playful typography in set

text_placement.ticker_strip_position: Full-width bottom — anchors entire ad width
text_placement.text_layering: Headline overlaid on dark left zone of photo — dark photo serves as background for text

graphics_and_image_placement.food_and_person_image_position: Right half — person eating pizza slice close-up, center-right
graphics_and_image_placement.image_style: Candid lifestyle close-up — emotionally relatable, UGC-feel but polished
graphics_and_image_placement.image_mood: Joy, indulgence, fun — person mid-bite with eyes closed in pleasure
graphics_and_image_placement.ticker_graphic: Red horizontal scrolling strip with repeated offer message + star separators
graphics_and_image_placement.offer_badge_graphic: White jagged starburst badge — consistent with Ad 2 device
graphics_and_image_placement.dark_gradient: Left side of photo has dark gradient/vignette — blends photo into text zone seamlessly

ads.overall_design_language: Most human and lifestyle-centric ad in the set. Uses a real person to create emotional identification and relatability — the joy of eating is demonstrated, not just implied by food. The scrolling ticker strip creates a sense of urgency and broadcast energy. Dark-to-light composition flows from text to person naturally.

message_delivery.message_flow: Playful hook headline (left) → Human desire demonstration (person eating, right) → Offer badge (top right) → Repeated offer reinforcement (ticker bottom)
message_delivery.emotional_trigger: Joy, relatability, FOMO — seeing someone enjoying food activates craving
message_delivery.offer_visibility: High — badge and ticker create dual offer touchpoints

cross_ad_patterns.dominant_brand_color: Zomato Red (#E8192C) — appears in 7 of 8 ads as primary or accent
cross_ad_patterns.exception_ad: Ad 7 — uses neutral cream/white palette as primary — deliberate premium contrast
food_image_placement_patterns: Left or center placement in vertical/story ads (Ads 1, 2, 5, 7)
text_placement_patterns: Horizontal ads: Text left, food right — consistent split
Vertical ads: Text upper zone, food mid zone — vertical stack
recurring_design_principles: Food photography always hero — never just illustrative
Single dominant offer per ad — no message clutter
Brand name always present but secondary to offer and food
High contrast text placement — text never fights with image
Appetite-stimulating warm color palettes across all ads
